task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tor Project check website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser or terminal window showing a successful connection to https://check.torproject.org/.

task_completion.description: Create or access the target OpsecLogs directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing the directory /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs being created or opened.

task_completion.description: Capture the raw HTML source code of the Tor check page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser 'View Source' window, developer tools showing the page's HTML, or a terminal command (like curl/wget) downloading the HTML.

task_completion.description: Save the HTML source code to the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named check_source.html visible in the /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs/ directory, or a text editor saving the HTML content to this path.

task_completion.description: Identify and extract the displayed exit IP address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IP address displayed on the check.torproject.org page being highlighted, copied, or typed into a text editor.

task_completion.description: Save the extracted IP address to the specified text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named exit_ip.txt visible in the /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs/ directory, with its contents showing ONLY the extracted IP address.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the live check.torproject.org website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual website loading in a browser or a genuine network request being made, not just a locally created mock file.

integrity.description: The IP address saved in the text file matches the one displayed on the website.
integrity.visual_evidence: The IP address in exit_ip.txt must be identical to the IP address shown on the check.torproject.org page during the session.

integrity.description: The IP file contains only the IP address without extra text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal output for exit_ip.txt should show strictly the IP address (e.g., '192.168.1.1' or an IPv6 address) and no surrounding text like 'Your IP is...'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://check.torproject.org/. Output directory: /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs. Source code file: /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs/check_source.html. IP address file: /home/ga/Documents/OpsecLogs/exit_ip.txt. The IP file must contain ONLY the IP address.
